east Namah (trident) (Jupiter)
Om Ram
South Agnaye Shakti Mesha Shukra
Agni Svaha
east Namah (Spear) vahini (Venus)
Om Yam
North Vayuve Ankusha Chandra
Vayu Bharati Mrigavahini
west Namah (goad) (Moon)
Om Ksham
South Rakshasaya Khadga Khadaga Rahu (North
Nirriti Khadgi
west Namah (sword) dharini Lunar Node)
Om Klim
Vishnave Chakra Lagna
Vishnu Nadir Lakshmi Vaishnavi
Namah (discus) (ascendant)
Om Hrim
Brah Padma Ketu (South
Zenith Brahmane Sarasvati Brahmani
ma (lotus) Lunar Node)
Namah
13
Aghori.it

The 7 categories of Yantra according to their use:
Sharir Yantras
The Yantras of the body, such as those of the chakras.
Dharan Yantras
The Yantras worn in various parts of the body, according to the
rituals prescribed by guru.
Āsan Yantras
